text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to let an exhausted Tokai Teio rest in the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm not tired at all, though...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I'll never hear the end of it if I don't take a
rest. I guess a little one wouldn't hurt...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh... Where am I?
Oh my gosh! Look, look! That's Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Who said that?!
Wooow! She's so cute!
And that's not all! She's super fast too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. How many of you are there?! And where
are you?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wait a second. Are you all...

text_block_list.name: The Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's right! We're the universe! Always
watching over you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: The Nature
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You're a treasure! No, you're the very
light that shines upon this world!

text_block_list.name: The Earth
text_block_list.text: You're so amazing, Teio! You really are the best!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I can't believe I'm being praised by the
universe! I really am amazing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh man, I can't just sit here. Hey, look at me run!

text_block_list.name: The Universe
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, this is so fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio runs and runs across a vast prairie.
Soon she's enveloped in light and...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? This is...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! My body feels so light!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay! Time to train!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio feels completely refreshed and
energized as she bounds out of the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But just then, out of nowhere...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf appears!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But you're still nowhere near my level.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an instant, the world around her is cloaked in
darkness and Tokai Teio suddenly feels herself
falling backwards.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...I feel like I just had a horrible nightmare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rudely awakened by her nightmare, Tokai Teio is
unable to properly rest.
